verses.1: Blessed is he whose disobedience is forgiven,
verses.2: Blessed is the man to whom the LORD doesn’t impute iniquity,
verses.3: When I kept silence, my bones wasted away through my groaning all day long.
verses.4: For day and night your hand was heavy on me.
verses.5: I acknowledged my sin to you.
verses.6: For this, let everyone who is godly pray to you in a time when you may be found.
verses.8: I will instruct you and teach you in the way which you shall go.
verses.9: Don’t be like the horse, or like the mule, which have no understanding,
verses.10: Many sorrows come to the wicked,
verses.11: Be glad in the LORD, and rejoice, you righteous!
